source.title: Evaporation of primordial black holes in a thermal universe: a thermofield dynamics approach

source_claims_recorded_as_inputs_only: Finite-temperature environment modifies Hawking radiation spectrum.
Thermofield Dynamics gives modified occupation numbers for Schwarzschild and Kerr geometries.
Early-universe reheating thermal bath enhances PBH evaporation.
Thermal corrections shorten PBH lifetime compared to zero-temperature vacuum.
boundary: No Chronos gravity stack binding map is claimed.
No unrestricted primordial black hole evaporation theorem is claimed.
No unrestricted primordial black hole formation theorem is claimed.
No dark matter detection is claimed.
No dark matter resolution is claimed.
No cosmic censorship result is claimed.
No hoop conjecture result is claimed.
No four-dimensional non-symmetric collapse theorem is claimed.
does_not_prove: unrestricted primordial black hole evaporation theorem
unrestricted primordial black hole formation theorem
